content_of_post_to_comment: I wasn’t born to fit into boxes. I was born to break them. Some people call that difficult. Some call it unconventional. I call it honest. Not everyone is meant to preserve the mold. Some people are meant to crack it open and remind others they were never trapped inside it to begin with.
comment: Breaking boxes is often framed as honesty, but some boxes are just coordination tools; the tension is knowing which constraints are limiting vs enabling.
